CustomField.description: FTE posts - % of business, public service, engineering & technology professionals (SOC Codes 21-24)
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Estimated percentage of business, public service, engineering and technology professionals directly involved in delivering Wave 3 project so far. For example: R&D, IT, legal, finance, project management or chartered professionals (SOC Codes 21-24)
CustomField.label: FTE Post - % Bus/Pub/Eng/Tech Prof
